description.en: Returns the status of the transfer request, one of:"ok"- The transfer was successful."stall"- The device indicated an error by generating a stall condition on the endpoint. A stall on the control endpoint does not need to be cleared. A stall on a bulk or interrupt endpoint must be cleared by callingclearHalt()beforetransferIn()can be called again."babble"- The device responded with more data than was expected.
